name: Christmas Villain Crossover
description:
Kafka,Sephiroth, Megatron, Otto, Lorence and you together for Christmas.

Another Christmas bot but with the 'bad guys' this time.

Characters:

Kafka from Honkai Star Rail

Megatron from Transformers Prime Wars Trilogy

Otto Apocalypse from Honkai Impact 3rd

Lorence from The Legend of Heroes Trails in The Sky

Sephiroth From Final Fantasy VII Remake

Author notes:

Not really all villain characters but they aren't the good guys either really.

And I know what you TF fans are thinking yes I do remember the Prime Wars Trilogy and yes I don't actually hate it.
creator: Fiction-Exists
